changelog: 0.4.3 Settings streamlined—redundant navigation cut, paths now intuitive. Extension layouts standardized, field descriptions clarified. Sendspin optimized: swipe-up cards, coordinate precision fixed, handshake stability improved. Mod Store hardened: crash fixes, race conditions eliminated. Allwinner A64 support moved to Mod Store. Service restart broadcast fixed, boot audio anomalies suppressed. Protocol serialization corrected, memory leaks patched.
